articles.title: Saudi Aramco's Ras Tanura refinery forced to shut down after reported drone attack
articles.snippet: A Reuters source is reporting that Saudi Aramco's Ras Tanura refinery, which is the largest oil refinery in the Middle East, was hit by a drone attack and forced to shut down as a precautionary measure. The source did note that the "situation is under control" though.However, the strike continues to highlight the kind of disruption that is hitting the oil market at the open. It's not just all about the Strait of Hormuz. There's tension and fears all over the region and oil refineries and tankers
